content: Canvas2D handles 1000-3000 draws/frame at 60fps on mid-range hardware; WebGL exceeds 50,000. For Mandelbrut (~100 stars per shell, 15-50 shells = ~5000 draw calls max at zoom-out), Canvas2D is sufficient with bake-on-freeze for frozen shells and LOD by zoom. Mobile GPUs are battery-constrained. Canvas2D advantages: no WebGL setup, works in restrictive iframe sandboxes (Devvit), simpler code, meets performance target with caching. WebGL/Phaser is Week-3 upgrade for 'Best Use of Phaser' prize only.
